week1.title: God’s Creation
week1.summary: In the beginning, God created the heavens and the earth. This week we reflect on the beauty and purpose of creation.

week2.title: Faith and Obedience
week2.summary: By faith Abraham obeyed when he was called to go out to a place that he was to receive as an inheritance.

week3.title: The Ten Commandments
week3.summary: God gave His law to guide His people. This week we study the commandments and their relevance today.

week4.title: Jesus Our Savior
week4.summary: For God so loved the world that He gave His only Son. This week we focus on salvation through Christ.
